decisions.title: Approve Astranis GA Rollout After Dashboard Review
decisions.context: ENG-8643 Amplitude dashboard ready for Astranis rollout/GA decision. Need to validate metrics before full customer launch to prove 'Embed Deeper' pillar progress.

arguments.for: Dashboard instrumentation complete, enables data-driven GA decision aligned with Signal>Evidence>Decision strategy
arguments.against: May need additional week to gather baseline metrics before committing to GA timeline

decisions.title: Scale RDS Instance to Address OOM Issues
decisions.context: ENG-9133 data-batcher OOMs + ENG-8424 RDS scaling + ENG-9278 WAL retention issues indicate infrastructure at capacity. Affects Canvas/Explore V2 reliability ('Nail the Core').
decisions.blockedBy: Cost approval needed for RDS upscaling; temporary mitigation via WAL retention adjustment in progress

arguments.for: Critical path blocker for product reliability; impacts customer trust and NPS
arguments.against: Significant cost increase; need to validate whether optimization work (ENG-9278) resolves before committing capex

decisions.title: Commit Resources to LLM Code Optimization Initiative
decisions.context: ENG-8900 research + ENG-8925 Claude action + ENG-9340 AGENTS.md + ENG-8825 internal docs suggest systematic AI-assisted development push. Potential productivity multiplier for 'Build the Moat'.

arguments.for: Engineering velocity force multiplier; competitive advantage in rapid prototyping (ENG-9238 POC spec benefits)
arguments.against: Distracts from customer-facing features; unclear ROI timeline; team needs training overhead

decisions.title: Prioritize E2 Calculated Channels Stability Over New Features
decisions.context: Multiple critical bugs in calculated channels (ENG-9342 plotting, ENG-9107 duplicates, ENG-8946 persistence, ENG-9117 edit workflow). Core 'Ask SIFT' capability undermined.

arguments.for: Calculated channels are north star 'Decision Capture' mechanism; bugs directly reduce Decisions Per Customer metric
arguments.against: New feature roadmap (FFT, family stats) creates competitive differentiation; bugs may have workarounds

decisions.title: Approve Production Deployment of LegendV2 with FFT
decisions.context: ENG-9343 decimal places + ENG-8545 FFT + ENG-8254 family collapsing ready. Enhances Canvas product pillar ('Embed Deeper'). But ENG-8946 legend persistence bug exists.
decisions.blockedBy: ENG-8946 saved panel legend settings bug must be resolved first to avoid customer confusion

arguments.for: FFT analysis highly requested feature for aerospace customers; LegendV2 improves visualization clarity
arguments.against: Deploying with known persistence bug violates 'Nail the Core' principle; risks support burden

timeAudit.weekSummary: High bug volume (12 active issues) creating reactive meeting load; infrastructure decisions blocking multiple threads
alerts: Wednesday 3/19: 7 hours meetings scheduled (decision deadline day - E2 prioritization)
Thursday 3/20: RDS scaling decision deadline but approval meeting not yet scheduled
Only 1 focus block today despite needing POC spec review (ENG-9238) and LLM strategy writeup

events.title: E2 Calculated Channels Prioritization Decision
events.description: Decide: Fix bugs first vs. ship new features. Impacts 4 active tickets and Q1 roadmap

events.title: RDS Scaling Approval
events.description: Finalize RDS instance upscaling decision to address OOM cascade. Cost vs. reliability tradeoff.

events.title: Astranis Dashboard Review
events.description: Review Amplitude instrumentation (ENG-8643) to set GA rollout date

events.title: Astranis GA Rollout Decision
events.description: Commit to GA timeline based on dashboard metrics. Key 'Embed Deeper' validation point.

events.title: LegendV2 + FFT Production Deployment
events.description: Ship if ENG-8946 resolved; otherwise defer to avoid tech debt. Canvas enhancement.

events.title: LLM Dev Tooling Strategy Finalization
events.description: Commit resources to AI-assisted development initiative after research synthesis (ENG-8900)

events.title: Q1 Strategy Review
events.description: Review 'Nail the Core' risk status; assess infrastructure debt vs. feature velocity balance

events.title: Python Rules Beta Kickoff
events.description: Initiate development after POC spec approval (ENG-9238). 'Build the Moat' flagship project.
